Short Description: Seasoned Ground Beef with a Smoky Special Burger Sauce and Caramelized Onions and Apple Cider Cabbage Slaw over Roasted Sweet Potato Wedges
Long Description: Seasoned ground beef finished with a smoky special burger sauce, served with caramelized onions and a crisp apple cider cabbage slaw over roasted sweet potato wedges for a bold, craveable plate with a nostalgic, American finish.

Short Description: Miso Garlic Chicken with a White Miso Glaze and Charred Broccolini and Roasted Mushrooms over Jasmine Rice
Long Description: Tender miso garlic chicken finished with a savory white miso glaze, served with charred broccolini and roasted mushrooms over jasmine rice for a rich, umami forward plate with a warm, savory finish.

Short Description: Carne Asada Steak with a Chimichurri and Roasted Sweet Plantains and Pickled Red Onions over Sazon Rice
Long Description: Marinated carne asada steak finished with a bright chimichurri, served with roasted sweet plantains and pickled red onions over sazon rice for a vibrant, Latin inspired plate with a fresh, herbaceous finish.

Short Description: Honey Garlic Shrimp with a Sticky Honey Garlic Glaze and Charred Broccoli and Roasted Red Peppers over Brown Rice
Long Description: Tender honey garlic shrimp finished with a sticky honey garlic glaze, served with charred broccoli and roasted red peppers over brown rice for a sweet, savory plate with a rich, caramelized finish.

Short Description: Seared Tofu in a Creamy Tikka Masala with Roasted Cauliflower and Chickpeas over Quinoa
Long Description: Crispy seared tofu in a rich creamy tikka masala, served with roasted cauliflower and chickpeas over quinoa for a warm, aromatic plate with a bold, comforting finish.

Short Description: Our golden high protein and collagen rich turmeric and coconut milk bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our golden turmeric and coconut milk bone broth slow-simmered for 24 hours with fresh ginger and warming spices.

Short Description: Mango chia pudding with coconut cream and fresh mango
Long Description: A creamy mango chia pudding layered with coconut cream and topped with fresh mango.
